sourceRef: tip:When to certify and when to wait

slides.headline: Timing Rule for Certifying
slides.body: Avoid overpayments by knowing when to certify and when to wait.

slides.headline: Understand Your Timelines
slides.body: Learn the timeline for certifying students under the Yellow Ribbon Program.
bullets: Check the relevant VA guidance for specific dates.
Understand the impact of the 85/15 rule.

slides.headline: Review Student Eligibility
slides.body: Ensure students meet the eligibility requirements for certification.
bullets: Verify if students have a Certificate of Eligibility (COE).
Check if they meet the Chapter 33 criteria.

slides.headline: Review Certification Forms
slides.body: Submit the appropriate certification forms for accurate processing.
bullets: Submit VA Form 22-1999 for Yellow Ribbon students.
Ensure all required documentation is included.

slides.headline: Wait Period
slides.body: Understand the wait period for certain certification requests.
bullets: Check if the student's application requires a wait period.
Follow the wait period to avoid processing prematurely.

slides.headline: Verify Compliance
slides.body: Ensure all certification actions are in compliance with VA regulations.
bullets: Review your SAA letter for compliance guidelines.
Stay updated with the latest VA regulations.

slides.body: Learn more about certification timelines and forms. Link in bio.
slides.headline: Read the full post

outline.caption: Timing is everything: Avoid overpayments and ensure compliance by knowing when to certify and when to wait.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 1, as it could benefit from a more engaging headline to capture attention.
